name: StreamNative
description: Managed Apache Pulsar service by the creators; event streaming cloud for unified messaging and streaming workloads.

seo.title: StreamNative — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure
seo.meta_description: StreamNative: Managed Apache Pulsar service by the creators; event streaming cloud for unified messaging and streaming workloads.

when_to_use: Managed Apache Pulsar by the project creators with full SLA
Unified messaging and streaming replacing Kafka and RabbitMQ
Multi-tenant messaging with namespace isolation on Pulsar
Geo-replication for active-active message streaming globally
Serverless Pulsar functions for stream processing without ops

pros: Managed Pulsar by the creators of the project
Unified messaging and streaming in one system
cons: Pricing aimed at mid/large data teams
review.verdict: Compelling if you want queues plus streams in one system; ecosystem inertia still favors Kafka for most teams.
review.best_for: Data teams needing unified queueing and streaming at scale
review.not_for: Small teams already well-served by managed Kafka
